title: NotebookLM Changed Completely: Here's What Matters (in 2026)
summary: NotebookLM has received major updates and now offers a three-column interface with Sources, Chat, and Studio panels. The Studio panel includes tools for generating reports, slide decks, infographics, mind maps, data tables, video overviews, quizzes, flashcards, and audio overviews from source documents.
